title: RequestFulfillment
description:
A Legacy Request fulfillment represents work that is done which changes the status of a request or a sample group within that request.
Fulfillments are created when state changes between IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, or FAILED statuses. Fulfillments do not capture a PENDING state because all Legacy Requests or Legacy Request Sample Groups are considered PENDING until the first corresponding fulfillment is created.

createdAt.description: Date and time the Legacy Request Fulfillment was created

entryId.description: ID of the entry this Legacy Request Fulfillment was executed in, if any

id.description: ID of the Legacy Request Fulfillment

modifiedAt.description: DateTime the Legacy Request Fulfillment was last modified

requestId.description: ID of the Legacy Request this fulfillment fulfills

sampleGroup.description: The Legacy Request Sample Group this fulfillment was executed upon, if any.
